decisions.decision: Update `frontend/src/routes/MarketList.tsx` to use the object-based filter model, passing no filters for the all-status view and only `{ status }` when a specific status is selected. That keeps the new default hidden-resolved behavior while preserving the existing resolved-status selector through the shared filter normalization.
alternatives_rejected: Leave `MarketList` on the legacy string argument shape instead of moving the route to the new shared filter model.
Pass `includeResolved: true` for every `MarketList` request and undo the new default for the all-status view.

decisions.decision: Explicitly opt `frontend/src/routes/System.tsx` and `frontend/src/features/graph/BayesNetGraph.tsx` into `{ includeResolved: true }` so platform-wide counts and resolved-market graph rendering continue to include resolved rows after the backend default changes.
alternatives_rejected: Leave both callers on the new default and accept undercounted system metrics or missing graph nodes for resolved market detail pages.
Broaden every `useMarkets()` caller to `{ includeResolved: true }` instead of opting in only where the product behavior requires it.

decisions.decision: Keep `frontend/src/routes/Portfolio.tsx`, `frontend/src/features/assumptions/AssumptionPanel.tsx`, and `frontend/src/features/trading/ConditionalEditor.tsx` on the default `useMarkets()` call and treat this step as an audit plus verification pass for those consumers rather than a widening change.
alternatives_rejected: Opt these consumers into resolved markets preemptively even though they already filter to active markets or only need live exposure labels.
Skip verification entirely and rely on the parent task's research without checking the existing callers and tests in this branch.

steps.task: Patch `frontend/src/routes/MarketList.tsx` so the selected status is converted into the new `useMarkets(...)` filter object shape: `undefined` for the default all-status view and `{ status }` for explicit selections, keeping resolved markets hidden by default while preserving the resolved-status path.

Update `frontend/src/routes/System.tsx` and `frontend/src/features/graph/BayesNetGraph.tsx` to call `useMarkets({ includeResolved: true })`, preserving platform aggregate stats and resolved-market graph coverage under the new backend default.

Audit the remaining step-4 callers in `frontend/src/routes/Portfolio.tsx`, `frontend/src/features/assumptions/AssumptionPanel.tsx`, and `frontend/src/features/trading/ConditionalEditor.tsx` to leave their `useMarkets()` usage unchanged and confirm their downstream logic still expects the active-only default collection.

Refresh focused frontend coverage for the caller behavior change, especially the route tests around `frontend/src/__tests__/MarketList.test.tsx` and `frontend/src/__tests__/System.test.tsx`, and run the relevant Vitest slices plus the existing API-client market-list tests to verify the call-site updates still align with the shared filter contract.
